question_text: Which of the following describes what happens during melting?

options.label: A
options.text: A solid turns into a liquid as temperature increases

options.label: B
options.text: A liquid turns into a gas as temperature decreases

options.label: C
options.text: A gas turns into a solid without passing through a liquid state

options.label: D
options.text: The mass of a substance increases when it changes state

correct_answer: A solid turns into a liquid as temperature increases
explanation: Melting is the process where a solid changes into a liquid when heated to its melting point. The particles in the solid gain enough energy to break free from their fixed positions and move more freely as a liquid. The mass of the substance stays the same during melting.
